nasb.text: “On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim by their armies, and the leader of the sons of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud,

esv.text: “On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim by their companies, the chief of the people of Ephraim being Elishama the son of Ammihud,

cnv.text: “在西方，按著隊伍，是以法蓮營的旗號；以法蓮人的領袖是亞米忽的兒子以利沙瑪。

ccb.text: 西边是以法莲营区及其旗号。以法莲人的首领是亚米忽的儿子以利沙玛，
